mapper.select:
SELECT H.hospital_id , H.hospital_code , H.hospital_name , H.business_no , HC.center_id , HC.center_code , HC.center_name , HC.head , HC.telephone , HC.homepage , HC.zipcode , HC.address1 , HC.address2 , HC.location_desc , HC.grade , HC.preday , HC.able_ct , HC.able_mri , HC.able_park , HC.able_soup , HC.able_satur , HC.able_special , HC.able_am , HC.receipt_normal_begin , HC.receipt_normal_end , HC.receipt_normal_pm_begin , HC.receipt_normal_pm_end , HC.receipt_satur_begin , HC.receipt_satur_end , HC.notes , HC.no_use , HC.advertisement , HC.center_adv_filename1 , HC.center_adv_filename2 , HC.center_adv_filename3 , HC.center_adv_filename4 , HC.center_adv_filename5 , HC.center_adv_filename6 , CASE HM.contract WHEN 1 THEN HM.center_manager_name END AS contract_manager_name , CASE HM.reserve WHEN 1 THEN HM.center_manager_name END AS reserve_manager_name , CASE HM.result WHEN 1 THEN HM.center_manager_name END AS result_manager_name FROM hospital H LEFT JOIN center HC ON H.hospital_id = HC.hospital_id LEFT JOIN center_manager HM ON HC.center_id = HM.center_id WHERE H.deleted_at IS NULL AND HC.deleted_at IS NULL
AND H.hospital_id = #{hospitalId}

SELECT C.company_id , C.company_name , CC.checkup_date_begin , CC.checkup_date_end , CC.reserve_date_begin , CC.reserve_date_end FROM company C LEFT JOIN ( SELECT company_id , MAX(checkup_year) AS checkup_year FROM company_checkup WHERE deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY company_id ) LAST_CC ON C.company_id = LAST_CC.company_id LEFT JOIN company_checkup CC ON LAST_CC.company_id = CC.company_id AND LAST_CC.checkup_year = CC.checkup_year LEFT JOIN center_manager_company CMC on C.company_id = CMC.company_id WHERE C.deleted_at IS NULL AND CMC.deleted_at IS NULL AND CMC.user_id = #{sessionUserId} ORDER BY CC.checkup_year DESC, C.company_name

SELECT hospital_id , hospital_code , hospital_name , business_no , hospital_center_name , ci_filename , ci_filename AS org_ci_filename , center_id , center_code , center_name , head , telephone , homepage , zipcode , sido , sigungu , address1 , address2 , location_desc , grade , preday , able_ct , able_mri , able_park , able_soup , able_satur , able_special , able_am , receipt_normal_begin , receipt_normal_end , receipt_normal_pm_begin , receipt_normal_pm_end , receipt_satur_begin , receipt_satur_end , notes , no_use , advertisement , center_adv_filename1 , center_adv_filename2 , center_adv_filename3 , center_adv_filename4 , center_adv_filename5 , center_adv_filename6 , center_adv_filename1 AS org_center_adv_filename1 , center_adv_filename2 AS org_center_adv_filename2 , center_adv_filename3 AS org_center_adv_filename3 , center_adv_filename4 AS org_center_adv_filename4 , center_adv_filename5 AS org_center_adv_filename5 , center_adv_filename6 AS org_center_adv_filename6 FROM hospital_center_view WHERE center_id = #{centerId}

SELECT hospital_center_view.hospital_name , hospital_center_view.hospital_id FROM company_checkup CC JOIN company C ON CC.company_id = C.company_id AND C.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT checkup_contract.company_checkup_id, checkup_contract.checkup_contract_id, checkup_contract.hospital_id, checkup_contract_type.center_id FROM checkup_contract JOIN checkup_contract_type ON checkup_contract.checkup_contract_id = checkup_contract_type.checkup_contract_id) CTR_LIST ON CC.company_checkup_id = CTR_LIST.company_checkup_id LEFT JOIN hospital_center_view ON hospital_center_view.hospital_id = CTR_LIST.hospital_id AND hospital_center_view.center_id = CTR_LIST.center_id WHERE CC.deleted_at IS NULL
AND C.company_id = #{companyId} GROUP BY hospital_center_view.hospital_id ORDER BY hospital_center_view.hospital_center_name

SELECT H.hospital_id , H.hospital_code , H.hospital_name , H.ci_filename , H.ci_filename AS org_ci_filename , C.homepage FROM hospital H LEFT JOIN center C ON H.hospital_id = C.hospital_id AND C.homepage IS NOT NULL AND C.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE H.hospital_id = #{hospitalId} LIMIT 0, 1;
SELECT hospital_id , hospital_code , hospital_name , business_no FROM hospital WHERE deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT item_class_id AS id , item_class_id AS key_id , NULL AS parent_id , NULL AS key_parent_id , 'class' AS item_type , item_class_code AS code , item_class_name AS name , NULL as hospital_checkup_id , NULL as hospital_id , NULL as checkup_year , NULL AS bill FROM item_class WHERE deleted_at IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT item_category_id AS id , item_category_id + 10000 AS key_id , item_class_id AS parent_id , item_class_id AS key_parent_id , 'category' AS item_type , item_category_code AS code , item_category_name AS name , NULL as hospital_checkup_id , NULL as hospital_id , NULL as checkup_year , NULL AS bill FROM item_category WHERE deleted_at IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT I.item_id AS id , I.item_id + 1000000 AS key_id , I.item_category_id AS parent_id , I.item_category_id + 10000 AS key_parent_id , 'item' AS item_type , I.item_code AS code , I.item_name AS name , HC.hospital_checkup_id as hospital_checkup_id , HC.hospital_id as hospital_id , HC.checkup_year as checkup_year , HC.bill AS bill FROM item I left join hospital_checkup HC on I.item_id = HC.item_id and HC.hospital_id = #{hospitalId} and HC.checkup_year = #{checkupYear} WHERE I.deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT center_name as center_list , center_id FROM center WHERE hospital_id = #{hospitalId}

INSERT INTO hospital_checkup ( hospital_id , checkup_year , item_id , ref_min , ref_max , ref_unit , bill , created_at , created_user_id , updated_at , updated_user_id) SELECT #{hospitalId} , #{checkupYear} , I.item_id , HC.ref_min , HC.ref_max , HC.ref_unit , HC.bill , NOW() , #{sessionUserId} , NOW() , #{sessionUserId} FROM item I JOIN hospital_checkup HC ON I.item_id = HC.item_id AND HC.hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND HC.checkup_year = (#{checkupYear} - 1) WHERE I.deleted_at IS NULL ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE ref_min = HC.ref_min , ref_max = HC.ref_max , ref_unit = HC.ref_unit , bill = HC.bill , created_at = NOW() , created_user_id = #{sessionUserId} , updated_at = NOW() , updated_user_id = #{sessionUserId};
